edgeCases: Evidence-JSON rejection: ActiveWorkflows accepts a file ONLY when parsed wf.Feature == file base name AND CurrentStep is non-empty and != 'done'; <feature>-<role>.json (feature != basename, empty CurrentStep) and ad-hoc roadmap.json/roadmap-quality.json are rejected. Verified live: alpha.json kept, alpha-qa-senior.json dropped.
Dedupe + recency: survivors deduped by wf.Feature keeping the most-recently-touched (max mtime) instance, then sorted by file mtime descending via sort.SliceStable.

Cap/more arithmetic: CapActive returns (wfs, 0) when max<=0 or len<=max, else (wfs[:max], len-max). Cap constant 5 chosen in cmd/ (outer layer); RenderContextCapped appends '+N more active' only when more>0.

FirstIncomplete cross-phase walk: walks every phase in declared order, returns first feature whose FeatureStatus != 'done' via shared FirstNotDone predicate; returns ('', false) for nil/empty/all-done. roadmapcheckpoint.FirstIncompleteBootstrap reuses FirstNotDone over BootstrapFeatures only — Phase-0 contract unchanged.
Silent no-roadmap path: hook session returns nil with NO output when roadmap.Load errors (absent OR malformed JSON). Verified live: empty output + exit 0 for both missing and invalid roadmap.json.
Roadmap-complete branch: when FirstIncomplete returns false, RenderSessionRehydration emits 'Roadmap complete' line, no 'Next feature' line, and no docs/features/<next>.md pointer. Verified live.

SessionStart matcher choice: single combined regex 'startup|clear|compact|resume'. Verified against current Claude Code hooks docs (SessionStart matchers are regex over the source string; docs show 'startup|resume' as a SessionStart example), so the combined matcher is honored — no per-source fallback needed.
G1: no file split required; all touched .go files <= 100 lines (render.go exactly 100, hooks.go 73). hooks_session.go split was NOT needed.

Regression safety: RenderContext signature unchanged (delegates to RenderContextCapped(_,0)); existing improve_centinela_render_ui and edge_case_context integration tests pass; existing setup/hooks_test.go mechanically updated to the 4-arg mergeHooks signature.
